raw_transcript: It hit me like a ton of bricks around nine AM, Doctor. Really sharp cramping on my left side. I rushed to the bathroom, and instead of a normal movement, I just passed what looked like dark red jelly and some blood clots. It scared the life out of me.
final_corrected_note: It hit me like a ton of bricks around nine AM, Doctor. Really sharp cramping on my left side. I rushed to the bathroom, and instead of a normal movement, I just passed what looked like dark red jelly and some blood clots. It scared the life out of me.
